$comment: The ONLY file you hand-edit. Keyed by slug (= repo name, or a custom slug for source:manual entries). Holds the human-authored fields; sync.mjs merges these over the GitHub-derived data. Any repo carrying the 'portfolio' topic but missing here is flagged as 'needs enrichment'. See docs/SCHEMA.md for field semantics.

moto-routes.title: Moto Routes
moto-routes.tagline: Curated motorcycle routes from real GPS data
moto-routes.description: Full-stack platform of verified Portuguese motorcycle routes — interactive Mapbox maps, multi-stage journey planning and GPX export. Built on React 19 + Supabase/PostGIS.
moto-routes.highlight: Real GPS routes, GPX export, bilingual

scenic-routes-simple.title: Scenic Routes
scenic-routes-simple.tagline: The 20 best scenic driving roads in Portugal
scenic-routes-simple.description: Interactive map of 20 hand-picked Portuguese scenic roads. React + Leaflet front-end, Python (GeoPandas) data pipeline, deployed on Vercel.

doc-chatbot-multi-llm.title: Multi-LLM Doc Chatbot
doc-chatbot-multi-llm.tagline: Chat with your PDFs across Gemini, Groq & Ollama
doc-chatbot-multi-llm.description: Upload TXT/PDF documents and query them with multiple LLMs (Google Gemini, Groq, local Ollama). Streaming answers and summaries. Deployed on Hugging Face Spaces.

ibm-hr-analytics.title: IBM HR Analytics
ibm-hr-analytics.description: Exploratory data analysis of the IBM HR attrition dataset in R, uncovering the factors behind employee turnover. Cegid Academy Data Science Program.

motogp-analytics.title: MotoGP Analytics
motogp-analytics.description: Data analytics over MotoGP championship datasets from 1949 to 2022, with a reproducible UV + Jupyter pipeline.

streamlit-sales-dashboard.title: Sales Dashboard
streamlit-sales-dashboard.description: Streamlit dashboard exploring sales KPIs with interactive filters and charts. Live on Streamlit Cloud.

streamlit-data-analysis-chatbot.title: Data Analysis Chatbot
streamlit-data-analysis-chatbot.tagline: Ask questions about your data in plain English
streamlit-data-analysis-chatbot.description: Chatbot for conversational data analysis and visualization using PandasAI + OpenAI.

sql-murder-mystery.title: SQL Murder Mystery
sql-murder-mystery.tagline: Cracking a murder case with SQL
sql-murder-mystery.description: My solution to Knight Lab's SQL Murder Mystery — interrogating a relational database with SQL to identify the culprit.
